title: Hypothesis-Driven Development
definition: Stating testable beliefs and designing experiments with clear success criteria before building.
whenToUse: Before any MVP or feature investment.
interviewPrompts: How would you test this hypothesis?

title: MVP Types
definition: Different minimum viable forms — concierge, wizard of oz, landing page, feature stub — matched to assumptions.
whenToUse: Scoping the smallest test for your riskiest unknown.
interviewPrompts: What MVP would you use for X and why?

title: Experiment Design
definition: Structured plan: hypothesis, metric, threshold, method, duration, and decision rule.
